name: Karak Wraith
description: A different take on the Grineer assault rifle, the Karak Wraith features unique styling.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A different take on the Grineer assault rifle, the Karak Wraith features unique styling.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the cloth ribbon on the Karak/Karak Wraith when equipped with the Desert-Camo and Conclave skin appearing distorted and behaving strangely. 
Fixed reload animation issues on the Karak/Karak Wraith when equipped with the Desert-Camo and Conclave skin.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Conclave Karak Skin not applying to the Karak Wraith.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed not being able to trade the Dera Vandal Blueprint, Karak Wraith Blueprint, Strun Wraith Blueprint, Snipetron Vandal Blueprint/Barrel and Sheev Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.1: Operation Shadow Debt.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Karak Wraith Barrel improperly being named as the Strun Wraith Barrel.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Karak Wraith clips giving you a surface to parkour off of.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.fixes: o   KARAK WRAITH: A different take on the Grineer assault rifle, the Karak Wraith features unique styling. (If Alad V is victorious at the end of the Event.)
